headline: 1 Healthcare Stock with Exciting Potential and 2 Facing Headwinds
summary: Healthcare companies are pushing the status quo by innovating in areas like drug development and digital health. Shareholders who bet on the industry have outperformed the market lately as the 1.1% drawdown for healthcare stocks over the past six months was relatively better than the S&P 500’s 2.8% decline.
